name: dev-explorations
description: Small, route-isolated UI explorations built with React and TanStack Router.

scripts.format: prettier --write "src/{components,hooks,routes}/**/*.{ts,tsx}" "src/{main,router}.tsx" src/vite-env.d.ts "src/components/**/*.scss" "src/styles/*.scss" .storybook/*.ts scripts/*.mjs eslint.config.js stylelint.config.mjs vite.config.ts package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.json README.md index.html
scripts.format:check: prettier --check "src/{components,hooks,routes}/**/*.{ts,tsx}" "src/{main,router}.tsx" src/vite-env.d.ts "src/components/**/*.scss" "src/styles/*.scss" .storybook/*.ts scripts/*.mjs eslint.config.js stylelint.config.mjs vite.config.ts package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.json README.md index.html
